content_en:
Women are allowed to avoid all forms of beautification as a sign of mourning for their husbands, children or relatives. This does not contradict the recommendations for patience, as long as the mourning does not exceed three days for her child or relative and four months and ten days for her husband. о Ё пәңп№ёп»Ўо Ўпә•п№ҫ п»ӨЩҗп»Ёп№ҫп»Әо Ёпәҙо  пә•п№ҫ пә’Щҗп»ҒЩҗп»ҙпәҸЩҚ п»“п№¶п»Өо  п»Ӣо  пәҺ п»“п№¶пә©о   пәғЩҺпәЁп№ёп»ӯп»«о  п»“пұўп»Іо Ў пәҳп№ёп»ӯо  пәөЩҚ пәӨЩҗп»ҙп»Ҙо ўпәӨо   пә’Щҗп»Ёп№ҫпә•Щҗ пә о  п»Ёп№¶пәҸо ўп»ҙо  п» п№¶п»° пәҜо  пәЁп№¶п» п№ҫпә•п№ё п»Ӣо   пә©о Ё пәңп№ёп»Ўо Ўп»Ёп№¶пәҸо ўп»ҙо  п»—п№¶пәҺп»ҹп№¶пә•п№ҫ пәҜ п»ӯЩ„ЩҺ пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»ӘЩҗ о Ўпәҙо  пә•п№ё пәӯо ўп»ӨЩҗп»Ңо   пәғЩҺп»Ёпұўп»І пәҙо  пәӯо ўпә”ЩҚ п»Ҹп№¶п»ҙо  пәҺпә о   пәӨо ўпәҺ п»ҹЩҗп»І пә’ЩҗпәҺп»ҹп»Ғпұўп»ҙпәҸЩҗ п»ӨЩҗп»Ҙо  пәҚп»ҹп» пұ п»ӘЩҗ п»Өо  п»—п№¶пәҺп»ҹп№¶пә•п№ҫ п»ӯ r пәӯЩҗо  п» п№¶п»° пәҚп»ҹп№ҫп»ӨЩҗп»Ёп№ҫпә’о  п»ҳп№ёп»ӯЩ„ЩҸ п»Ӣо   п»ҙ : )) пәӨЩҗЩ„пұЎо  п»»п№¶ п»ҙ пә”п№¶ о  п»Ңо  пә’о ўпәқЩҚ пәғЩҺпәӯо ўп»ӯо  п» п№¶п»° пәҜо  п»•п№¶ пәңп№¶п»јп№¶пәҷЩҚ пәҮЩҗп»»пұ  п»Ӣо ўпә•ЩҚ п»“п№¶п»ӯо ¬п»ҙо  п» п№¶п»° п»Өо   п»Ӣо ©п»ЎЩҗ пәҚп№ҫп»өпәЁЩҗпәӯЩҗ пәҳп№ёпәӨЩҗпә©о ўп»ӯо  пәҚп»ҹп№ҫп»ҙо   пә’ЩҗпәҺп»ҹп» пұ п»ӘЩҗ п»ӯо ЎпәғЩҺпә“ЩҚ пәҳп№ёпә…Щ’п»ӨЩҗп»Ҙо  пәӯо ў Щҗп»»п»Ө пәҚо Јпәёп№ҫпәӯо  п»Ӣо  пәӯЩҚ п»ӯо ЎпәғЩҺпәёп№ҫп»¬ ((. Zaynab bint Abee Salamah reported that when she went to see Zaynab bint Jahsh35 after her brother died, she asked for some perfume. After wearing it, she said, вҖңI donвҖҷt need any perfume, except that I heard the Prophet (r) say: It is not allowable for any woman who believes in Allaah and the Last Day to mourn for the dead for more than three (days), except in the case of her husband, in which case she may do so for four months and ten days.вҖқ36 34 Sahih Muslim, vol.2, pp.435-36, no.1999, Sunan Abu Dawud, vol.2, p.888, no.3113, Sunan Ibni-Majah, vol.2, p.447, no.1598, Muwatta, p.112, no. 554 and Mishkat Al-Masabih,, vol.1, p.337. 35 The ProphetвҖҷs wife and cousin. 36 Sahih Al-Al-Al-Al-Al-Bukhari, vol.2, p.207, no.370, Sahih Muslim, vol.2, p.776, no. 3540, Sunan Abu Dawud, vol.2, p.624, no.2292 and Mishkat Al-Masabih,, vol.1, p.709.

Forbidden Actions by Those Present
content_id:
Wanita diperbolehkan menghindari segala bentuk perhiasan sebagai tanda berkabung atas suami, anak, atau keluarganya. Hal ini tidak bertentangan dengan anjuran bersabar, selama masa berkabung tidak melebihi tiga hari untuk anak atau keluarga, dan empat bulan sepuluh hari untuk suami. Zaynab binti Abu Salamah melaporkan bahwa ketika ia mengunjungi Zaynab binti Jahsy setelah saudaranya meninggal, Zaynab meminta parfum. Setelah memakainya, ia berkata, "Aku tidak membutuhkan parfum, kecuali karena aku mendengar Nabi п·ә bersabda: 'Tidak halal bagi wanita yang beriman kepada Allah dan Hari Akhir untuk berkabung atas orang yang meninggal lebih dari tiga hari, kecuali dalam hal suami, di mana ia boleh berkabung selama empat bulan sepuluh hari.'"

Tindakan-Tindakan yang Dilarang bagi Mereka yang Hadir
